div1.entryFree: Lisp, to speak affectedly with a particular articulation: these --ing hawthorn-buds, Wiv. III, 3, 77. a can carve and l. LLL V, 2, 323. look you l. and wear strange suits, As IV, 1, 34. antic, --ing, affecting fantasticoes, Rom. II, 4, 29. you amble and you l. Hml. III, 1, 151. With to: --ing to his master's old tables, H4B II, 4, 289.
